Home.headline: Bring team decisions together in one place
Home.description: This is the Questboard Next.js frontend scaffold. It ships with design tokens, FontAwesome, and i18n from the start.
Home.developmentAuthBadge: Development mode is treated as already authenticated
Home.designTokensDescription: CSS variables are imported directly from token files.
Home.localesDescription: ja, en, fr, zh, ru, es, ar
